title: melampyrum pratense subsp. alpestre
intro: Melampyrum pratense subsp. alpestre, also known as alpine monkey flower, is a plant species that belongs to the family Orobanchaceae. It is a parasitic plant that derives its nutrients by connecting to the roots of other plants. The medicinal properties of alpine monkey flower include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and an antioxidant, which can help to reduce swelling and protect cells from damage. Herbal preparations of alpine monkey flower are often used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, and its health benefits include reducing symptoms of allergies and asthma, as well as supporting immune function.
